title: Messaging Outcomes and Delivery Evidence in Go · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent Go integration team receives different topology, traffic, schema, tenant, dependency, and shutdown constraints and transfers the module into a new a typed outcome and ownership evidence record. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a typed outcome and ownership evidence record with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Distinguish commands, events, notifications, documents, and queries by ownership, audience, expected handling, and change semantics; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

State at-most-once, at-least-once, effectively-once effect, ordering, and durability claims without promising impossible end-to-end exactly-once delivery; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Outcome Evidence Contract
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 7505 during canary Go consumer decoding old and new envelopes. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate local publication, broker custody, and observable stakeholder effect; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then add a subscriber responsibility without changing publisher intent. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Outcome Evidence Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Outcome Evidence Contract, keep Outcome Evidence Contract connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
